name: Yum-a-Setta Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Cream of Chicken Soup - undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the hamburger with salt, pepper, and brown sugar.
2. Add chopped onion to the mixture.
3. Stir in tomato soup.
4. Cook egg noodles separately and drain them.
5. Mix in cream of chicken soup.
6. Combine the hamburger mixture and noodle mixture in a 2-quart casserole dish.
7. Layer processed cheese between the hamburgers and noodles.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes, covered.
